steps.title: Use two points
steps.content: The point $(0,4)$ is on the line. A slope of $6$ means one step to the right raises $y$ by $6$, so another point is $(1,10)$. Use these two points directly.

steps.title: Find the line from the data
steps.content: A line with slope $6$ has the form $f(x)=6x+b$. Since $(0,4)$ is on the line, $4=6(0)+b$, so $b=4$. The function is $f(x)=6x+4$.

steps.title: Match the answer
steps.content: A choice with slope $4$ and no intercept. A choice with slope $24$. A choice with slope $10$. Only the matching choice has slope $6$ and intercept $4$, so C is correct.
